settings.name: Pure Silver
settings.description: Authentic 925 sterling silver, BIS hallmarked. No compromise, no coating. Made to last a lifetime.

settings.name: Gold-Plated Silver
settings.description: The warmth of gold, the integrity of a pure silver base. For everyday luxury and occasion dressing alike.

settings.name: Gold-Plated Alloy
settings.description: Thoughtfully designed pieces at accessible price points — without sacrificing the Rangtarini standard of design.

settings.hero_sub: Handcrafted Indian jewelry, rooted in Rajasthan. Regal by design. Yours to wear.
settings.founder_body:
My name is Bhoomika Ranawat. I grew up in Jodhpur — surrounded by jewelry the way most children are surrounded by toys. At weddings, at temples, at Sunday markets.

Silver anklets. Gold chokers. Jhumkas passed from mother to daughter like quiet heirlooms. I didn't study jewelry. I absorbed it. I learned to read a piece — whether it carries something real, or whether it's just surface.

Every piece at Rangtarini passes one test: does it feel worthy? Worthy of the craft. Worthy of the woman who will wear it. If it doesn't — it doesn't make the cut.
settings.mission_quote: Fine Indian jewellery has always existed. What hasn't — is access to it.
settings.mission_body:
The intricate meenakari work, the kundan settings, the filigree jhumkas — designs with centuries of lineage — out of reach for the very women who grew up loving them. Rangtarini changes that.

By working with 925 sterling silver and gold-plated silver, we bring regal, handcrafted Indian jewelry into everyday life — without asking you to choose between authenticity and affordability.
settings.origin_body:
Rangtarini is rooted in Rajasthan — its havelis, its lakes, its centuries of craft. A land where jewelry has never been mere decoration. It has always been identity.

That quiet confidence — unhurried, unperformed — is what we hope every Rangtarini piece carries. Not jewelry that demands attention. Jewelry that earns it.
settings.mat_sub: Every piece is handcrafted and selected by hand. What unites them is not material — it is intent.
settings.bespoke_body: For the bride with a vision. The daughter recreating her mother's piece. The woman who knows exactly what she wants and hasn't found it yet. One conversation at a time, from concept to creation.
settings.signoff_quote: Every piece we add is another step toward making regal Indian jewellery truly everyone's.
